metcon.name: Partner workout
metcon.description:
Rest 3 mins then
50 wall balls
50 box overs
30 devils press

hypertrophy.reasoning: Metcon heavily taxes shoulders, quads, glutes, and triceps; accessory work targets posterior chain and biceps for balanced development.

siri_text: Saturday's workout. Metcon: Partner workout. Workout: 50 wall balls, 50 box overs, 30 devils press. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, hamstrings.
